item.title: DHS says it's suspending TSA PreCheck and Global Entry due to shutdown
item.description: The rare move will result in longer lines, likely frustrating many travelers.

item.title: Most Americans disapprove of Trump; don't trust Dems in Congress more: Poll
item.description: A record high say he "lacks good enough physical health" to be president.

item.title: Heavy snow, 60 mph wind gusts: What to expect from major nor'easter
item.description: A significant nor’easter is expected to march up the East Coast on Sunday into Monday, bringing significant snow for the I-95 corridor.

item.title: WATCH: Baby giraffe and ostrich face off in 'staring contest'
item.description: Rahisi, a young giraffe, engaged in a “staring contest” with an ostrich in a neighboring habitat at the Memphis Zoo.

item.title: WATCH: Combating social media in the 'brain rot' era
item.description: ABC News’ Will Ganss looks at new ways to curb our cellphone obsession and cut down on screen time.
